description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Tests that runs on every push and pull request. Use two jobs: UnitTests and BoostCMakeBuild. UnitTests runs on a matrix of OS, build type, shared library, and generator, performing checkout, installation, configuration, build, and test steps. BoostCMakeBuild runs on ubuntu-16.04, checks out boostorg/boost, installs dependencies, and builds and tests the nowide library in both static and shared configurations.
